title: Elk and Friends 8oz Glass Kids + Toddler Drinking Cups | The Original Mason Jars with Lids + Sleeves + Straws | Smoothie Cups | Spill Resistant | Dishwasher Safe | 4 Pack
features: LOVE: Kids and Moms 'love' our tumblers! The ‘Original’ Glass Mason jar cup designed by Elk and Friends. We’ve listened, tested and fine-tuned our products to meet every one of your needs. Also, the extra bonus is these cups use the same straws & sleeves as our 10oz stainless steel drinking cups. Also available in 12oz & 16oz.

WHAT'S INCLUDED: This set includes 4 * 8oz mason glass jars, 4 * silicone sleeves, 8 lids (4 Straw Lids with spout + 4 * leak-proof & air-tight lids), 4 silicone straws with stoppers and straw cleaning brush.
STRAW STOPPERS: Our toddler cups have straws with stoppers. No more mess with toddlers pulling out their straws. Our straws are also a little wider for those thicker smoothie drinks.

CHILD-FRIENDLY FUNCTIONALITY: Crafted with little ones in mind, our jars are designed with a grippy silicone sleeve and slim narrow design for small hands, minimizing spills and making it suitable all round.

SAFE, DURABLE MATERIALS: Made from high quality glass and food grade silicone; the materials are non porous, made for everyday use and dishwasher and microwave safe (no need to remove the silicone sleeve). All our products are independently tested to ensure they are 100% safe. Built to last, they’re for families who value quality and safety.

ELK AND FRIENDS: Since 2015, we have been creating mindfully designed, environmentally friendly products for the most precious little people in your life. Safe, fun and made with natural materials, every design is crafted with care for both kids and the planet. Thank you for choosing Elk and Friends – we’re so happy to be part of your family’s journey.
description: Product Description About Elk and Friends We create safe, fun and eco products for the precious little people in your life. We source quality, natural materials which are independently tested ensuring each design is 100% safe for our children and our environment. 8oz Glass Mason Drinking Jars + Food Storage Our iconic glass mason jars are perfect for kids and toddlers’ drinks and great for storage of snacks on the go. Each jar has measurement markings on the side for exact portion control. The cute and colourful silicone sleeves are designed to bring an element of fun to daily drinks, providing protection from bumps and improved grip for those little hands. Kids and Mom’s LOVE our tumblers. Feedback is "kids are drinking more water because this is their favorite cup”. Silicone Straws + Stopper Thanks to our innovative stopper, toddlers can’t pull out their straws from our drinking jars. Versatile From straw to sippy to storage jar, our drinking jars are versatile and designed to be multi-functional. Easy to Clean With very few parts our drinking jars are easy to use and even simpler to disassemble and clean.
